style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged edges, casting distorted, elongated shadows that bend unnaturally around the body; slow drifting mist particles with faint purple luminescence drift upward like smoke, while energy pulses of pale blue light pulse through the translucent skin, illuminating the mist; eerie purple ghost luminescence bathes the scene in cold, dim light, casting long, wavering shadows on the ground; Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
